ham.subject: This Week’s Deals Inside – Exclusive Offers Await!
ham.body:
Hi there,

Hope you’re having an awesome week! We’ve got a fresh batch of products that we think you’ll love. From the latest gadgets to stylish apparel, there’s something for everyone. 

💥 Special for our newsletter readers: Use code WELCOME20 at checkout for 20% off your first purchase. 

🛒 Check out the new arrivals now: <URL>

Thanks for being part of our community. Stay tuned for more surprises and discounts coming your way.

Cheers,
The Marketing Team

spam.subject: Urgent HR Notice: Payroll Update Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have identified an issue with your payroll account that requires immediate attention. To avoid any delays in your upcoming salary, please verify your banking details within the next 24 hours.

Click the link below to update your information securely:
<URL>

If you do not act promptly, your salary payment may be postponed. This is a mandatory step as per company policy.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
HR Department
